name: Creatinine Clearance Calculator
seo_description: Use our free creatinine clearance (cockcroft-gault) to quickly estimate crcl based on age, weight, creatinine. No registration needed.
result_context: The clearance >90 mL/min es normal; <60 indica enfermedad renal crónica que requires evaluation médica.
formula_display: CrCl = ((140 - edad) × weight × 0.85 si mujer) ÷ (72 × creatinine)
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que age estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online creatinine clearance (cockcroft-gault). Enter age and weight to get instant results.
